description:
Fix the Dashboard quick actions and add breadcrumbs to all entity pages.

## Part A: Dashboard Quick Actions
**File:** `src/components/dashboard/dashboard-client.tsx`

- Add "Contacts" quick action for admin/manager/backoffice roles (currently has NO dashboard link)
- Add "New Event" quick action for booking/label roles (only "New Artist" exists today)
- Fix Gastro "Bar-Bestand" link: ensure it reads `?category=bar` from URL on inventory page (see Phase 5 task)
- Add "Venues" quick action for admin/manager roles
- Verify existing quick actions all have correct hrefs and role checks

## Part B: Breadcrumbs on ALL entity pages
Already defined in FN-002. This is a tracking/verification task to ensure breadcrumbs were applied everywhere:
- events/[id], events/[id]/edit, events/new
- artists/[id], artists/[id]/edit, artists/new
- staff/[id]/edit, staff/new
- guest-lists/[id]
- inventory/[id]
- venues (list page)
- contacts (list page) 

The Breadcrumbs component should already exist from FN-002 — just verify all pages are updated.

### Tests
- Each quick action renders for correct roles
- Each quick action navigates to correct URL
- All entity pages have breadcrumbs rendered

log.action: Task moved to triage — filesystem validation failed
